response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and multiple languages including TypeScript and Node.js. Recent role at re:cinq touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which aligns with the JD's interest in agentic workflows. However, the resume lacks demonstrated experience with production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or major cloud platforms (AWS limited to CDK for non-AI work; no GCP/Azure). The Staff-level customer-facing FDE profile requires deeper AI delivery experience than shown.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software with strong TDD/CI/CD and craftsmanship background
Recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Polyglot engineer (TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent) with proven mentoring and workshop-leading experience
concerns: No demonstrated production GenAI, RAG, or vector database experience on the resume
Limited evidence of deep cloud-platform AI system design (AWS CDK only; no GCP/Azure or ML infra)
No clear track record leading customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise AI delivery

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic tooling work
Strong senior engineering and mentoring track record
